case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. MAGDA GIOCONDA RODRIGUEZ

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $738.67 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, MAGDA GIOCONDA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-06-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, MAGDA GIOCONDA $136.00 PRINCIPAL, $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $231.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$65.00) SERVED FEB-21-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, MAGDA GIOCONDA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-06-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-06-2018 BY PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY PRISCILLA TOVAR, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY OPORTUN INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-06-2018 - JUDGMENT.
